articles.title: 'VIX' futures expiry may signal volatility inflection point, says BTIG's Krinsky
articles.summary: The April futures contract on the Cboe Volatility Index expires Wednesday, and such events can prove "a fulcrum for risk," says Jonathan Krinsky, technical strategist at BTIG. The index is an options-derived measure of the expected volatility of the S&P ...

articles.title: Low Volatility ETFs to Watch Amid Major Tech Sell-Off Over AI Panic
articles.summary: USMV and other low-volatility ETFs gain appeal as an AI-driven tech rout wipes $1T, spikes VIX, and fuels rotation into staples and value sectors.

articles.title: VIX rising 11% even after Budget indicates traders are bracing for volatility, say market analysts
articles.summary: For investors, a high Vix means that they need to focus on quality and stick to their stop-loss strategy,' an analyst said.

articles.title: VIX surges as stock-market selloff looks set to continue after Challenger report
articles.summary: Wall Street's so-called fear gauge jumped Thursday morning and the stock market selloff's appeared set to continue as investors assessed the Challenger, Gray & Christmas report showing that job cuts soared in January.
